name: typeless-companion
title: Typeless Companion
description: Browse and copy local Typeless transcripts.
author: arjan.flac

commands.name: view-history
commands.title: Browse History
commands.description: Browse, filter, copy, and paste saved Typeless transcripts.

commands.name: copy-last-transcript
commands.title: Copy Previous Transcript
commands.description: Copy the most recent saved Typeless transcript.

preferences.name: quickMode
preferences.title: Transcript Type
preferences.description: Choose which saved Typeless transcript this command copies.

preferences.name: databasePath
preferences.title: Database Path
preferences.description: Override the local Typeless SQLite database path.

preferences.name: copyWindowBehavior
preferences.title: Window Behavior On Copy
preferences.description: What to do with the window when copying a transcript to the clipboard.
